hooks.command: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.BalloonTipTitle = 'Claude Code'; $n.BalloonTipText = '작업이 완료되었습니다.'; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(5000); Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $n.Dispose()
